summary: The network error divergence is rustfmt-only noise in session error matching and semicolon placement; no ban, fatality, or backoff behavior changed.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 159: M	crates/net/network/src/error.rs.
The isolated patch adds semicolons to existing returns and reformats pattern alternatives in merits_discovery_ban, is_fatal_protocol_error, and should_backoff.
No NetworkError mapping, P2P/Eth handshake error classification, disconnect reason grouping, ECIES error grouping, or backoff classification changed.
